chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Revision No. S- 07 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application. 29.07.2024. Mr. Mumtaz Ali Jessar, Advocate for the Applicant. Mr. Rafique Ahmed K. Abro, Advocate for the Respondents. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. After arguing the instant Criminal Revision at some length, it is stated by learned Counsel for the Applicant that due to changed circumstances, he would not press the disposal of instant Crl.Revision Application before this Court provided subject to law, the applicant is permitted to file a fresh direct complaint with the Court having jurisdiction, which is not opposed by the learned Deputy Prosecutor General for the State and learned Counsel for the Respondents. Order accordingly. J U D G E
